reviews.comment:
Precios un poco altos por la tasa municipal que cobran. Estaban trabajando en dos surtidores por lo que solo funcionaban dos y provocó demoras. Buena atención de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
Prices are a bit high due to the municipal tax they charge. They were working on two pumps, so only two were operational, causing delays. The attendants were helpful.
